case_title: ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. VS. DAVID PHILLIPS ET AL

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 AND EACH OF THEM INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-11-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-13-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-19-2018
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-03-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-11-2018 CONTINUED TO MAY-23-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-03-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-23-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-03-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES:
Ryan Dahm, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
